about.description_1: I am a Computer Science student at UNIP (7th/8th semester), passionate about technology and constantly learning. Currently a IT intern at Mar Brasil, with previous experience in Market Intelligence at Zukkin.
about.description_2: I believe that technology should be accessible. That's why I offer modern solutions at fair prices for small and medium-sized companies that want to grow digitally.
highlights: Praia Grande – SP | National remote service

hero.description: I'm Gustavo, a specialist in Frontend and AI Automations (n8n). I help small and medium-sized businesses grow with accessible technology and real results.

services.subtitle: Complete digital solutions to make your business grow

items.title: Landing Pages that Convert
items.description: Creation of modern, responsive, and high-performance websites. Using React and cutting-edge technologies to take your business to the next level.

items.title: Intelligent Automations with n8n
items.description: I automate your company's repetitive processes by integrating WhatsApp, Google Sheets, APIs, and more. Save hours of manual work every week.
items.cta: I want to automate my business

items.title: Freelance Data Analysis
items.description: Dedicated action as a freelancer for data collection, processing, and analysis. With real market experience (ex: Zukkin) and fast learning, I adapt to your business to deliver automated scans, pricing reports, and valuable insights.
items.cta: I want to empower my data

whatsapp.message: Hi Gustavo, I saw your website and would like a quote!

items.description: Responsive landing page development focused on conversion and intelligent automations with n8n integrating WhatsApp, CRM and databases. Serving clients across various segments.

Massive competitor data collection via ZROBOT, database auditing and cleansing, competitive data validation and strategic insight generation for the commercial team. Developed ZBOT — internal chatbot for new employee support.
IT infrastructure support, asset inventory management and development of device monitoring automations integrating MaaS360 and Auvo with Power BI dashboards.

items.title: AI Agents with n8n Immersion
items.description: AI agent creation with n8n, integration with Evolution API, RD Station CRM, Google Calendar and Supabase. Complete automations with humanized messaging.

items.title: Santander Front-end
items.description: Complete front-end development training with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and agile methodologies. Final project with practical application.
